# Changelog

All notable changes to `@injectivelabs/x402` are documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

## [0.1.0-rc.1] — 2026-05-12

Initial release of the Injective EVM SDK for the x402 Payment Protocol.

### Added

- **Protocol verifier** (`@injectivelabs/x402/protocol`) — pure functions to verify
  EIP-3009 `transferWithAuthorization` payment payloads against requirements,
  with injectable hooks for nonce, balance, and token-name reads.
- **`InjectiveFacilitator`** class for verify and settle on Injective EVM, with
  configurable RPC, signer, allowed assets, and minimum payment thresholds.
- **Express middleware** (`injectivePaymentMiddleware`) for resource servers to
  gate routes behind native USDC payments.
- **Client helper** (`createPayment`) for signing EIP-3009 authorizations from
  `PaymentRequirements`, with explicit EIP-712 version resolution (registry
  first, `extra.version` fallback, hard error for unknown assets).
- **EIP-3009 helpers** (`@injectivelabs/x402/eip3009`) for typed-data construction,
  signature recovery, and on-chain reads (`isNonceUsed`, `getTokenBalance`,
  `getTokenName`).
- **Network and token registry** — Injective EVM mainnet (chain `1776`) and
  testnet (chain `1439`), native USDC on both, with explicit EIP-712 domain
  metadata. `registerToken()` available for runtime registration of additional
  EIP-3009 tokens.
- **Strict Zod schemas** (`@injectivelabs/x402/schemas`) for all HTTP-boundary
  payloads with explicit byte caps.
- **Subpath exports** (`/networks`, `/facilitator`, `/client`, `/middleware`,
  `/protocol`, `/eip3009`, `/schemas`) for tree-shakeable consumption.
- Reference self-hosted facilitator example under `examples/facilitator/` and
  a paywalled-API example under `examples/server/`.
- Mainnet/testnet smoke harness (`examples/client/src/smoke-testnet-usdc.ts`)
  with explicit mainnet confirmation gate.

### Validated

- Mainnet direct EIP-3009 settlement:
  [`0x7576…bde71`](https://blockscout.injective.network/tx/0x7576d60a034ccdff6244615cfe194f4159f487939e971a7cd93a74c7659bde71)
- Mainnet hybrid x402 paywall flow:
  [`0xb101…49bbb`](https://blockscout.injective.network/tx/0xb101d6d5119a15ab68f26b16bdb89d5915b463527d4a4d7ddda212ad03449bbb)

### Design boundaries

- **Native USDC only.** USDT and WINJ are present in the registry as
  informational; only EIP-3009 tokens are payable via x402 in this release.
- **Protocol vs. operations.** This package owns Injective x402 protocol facts
  (network registry, EIP-3009 typed data, verification logic). Hosted-operator
  concerns (KMS key custody, replay caches, OFAC checks, gas caps, retry
  policy) live outside the package by design — production deployments compose
  them on top of the protocol layer.
